description: A love-forever classic, this murcia bag is a closet essential. Perfect for colour blocking and mix-and-match ensembles, make this piece your go-to essential to add a fresh twist to off-duty staples. Height: 28 cm Width: 28 cm Soft, supple leather upper Fabric lining A flap with metal embellishment on the fornt and a magnetic button closure One main zippered compartment with a pouch and a zippered pocket One detachable shoulder strap A zippered pocket at the back Care Do not machine wash Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
